posts.caption:
Golden hour… but let’s make it forever ✨🍯

This week’s treasures are glowing in all the right ways, warm amber glass, delicate vintage curves, and pieces that feel like they’ve lived a story before finding you. The kind you don’t just decorate with… you collect.

From statement candy dishes to soft, nostalgic details, every piece is handpicked for that cozy, curated Hiraeth Haven feel 🤍

Mom called… she said she wants vintage 🤭💐

Skip the last-minute flowers (okay… maybe not skip them entirely 👀) and give her something that lasts longer than a week, something with a little history, a little charm, and a whole lot of “where did you find this?!”

To make it even sweeter…

A little peek at what found new homes this week… 🤍🍀

From charming kitchen pieces to timeless décor, each of these treasures has started its next chapter somewhere new and that never gets old to us.

There’s something really special about knowing these pieces aren’t just things… they’re part of someone’s space, their routines, their story now.

Thank you for supporting small, choosing vintage, and giving these pieces a second life ✨ Don’t worry, more beautiful finds are always on the way.

✨ A little brassy moment, frozen in time ✨

These vintage brass swans feel like something you’d find tucked away in a quiet, sunlit corner of a storybook home… waiting to be rediscovered 🦢

Smooth, sculptural, and effortlessly elegant, they bring that soft, nostalgic glow that only true vintage can. Style them on a vanity, bookshelf, or coffee table and watch how they instantly elevate the space.
